name: What should I avoid when writing AEO content?
description: Avoid generic, copied, or overly promotional content. AEO favors original, clearly structured answers with a consistent message and real proof.

mainEntity.name: What should I avoid when writing AEO content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Do not copy competitor phrasing too closely, because that can make your content look interchangeable. A better approach is to use your own wording, add original information, and create a consistent description of who you are and what you do across your site and external mentions.
acceptedAnswer.description: Avoid generic, copied, or overly promotional content. AEO favors original, clearly structured answers with a consistent message and real proof.
